ragflow-kb-001.title: ragflow-setup.md
ragflow-kb-001.content: Configure the adapter by setting RAGFLOW_BASE_URL and RAGFLOW_API_KEY in .env, then set RAGFLOW_MODE=ragflow to forward requests to a live RAGFlow instance.

ragflow-kb-001.title: knowledge-id-routing.md
ragflow-kb-001.content: Pass the exact RAGFlow knowledge base ID as knowledge_id in each retrieval request so queries are routed to the correct dataset.

ragflow-kb-001.title: integration-validation.md
ragflow-kb-001.content: After switching to ragflow mode, POST a test query to /api/v1/retrieval and inspect the returned records, scores, and metadata to confirm the RAGFlow integration is working.
